Feel The Chill In Seconds

The built-in RapidCool™ Airflow System uses advanced evaporator technology to speed up the chilling process, delivering a powerful blast of refreshing cold air.

Have it mounted up high where our dog cannot knock it over. Keeps us cool all summer and warms us up before we get out of bed now that the mornings are getting chilly.
— Susan H., Verified Customer

Slash Your Electric Bill

Running central air all day costs a fortune. This energy-efficient unit lets you control the climate in the room you need, saving you money on your utility bills every single month while running whisper-quiet.

I am always careful about running AC because it gets so expensive. Now I just run this unit in the living room while I watch television. My last power bill was much lower, which was a very pleasant surprise. — Jim L., Verified Customer

Adjust Without Getting Up

Stop getting up to adjust a dial. The included wireless remote puts full temperature control right at your fingertips, so you can cool down or warm up the room without ever leaving your seat.

Having the little remote right next to me on the end table is wonderful. If I feel a chill while reading, I just push a button to warm the room up without ever leaving my chair. — Diana P., Verified Customer

Reclaim Your Floor

No more heavy lifting, mounts securely on
the wall to give you your space back. It eliminates dangerous tripping hazards and keeps hot elements safely away from grandkids and pets.

I am not very handy, but I was able to hang my unit on the wall in just a few minutes. It cools down my stuffy sewing room remarkably fast. — Margaret R., Verified Customer

Whisper-Quiet

Engineered to be ultra-quiet while delivering a steady stream of cooling air for an uninterrupted peaceful sleep.

I put this in my bedroom because my old AC was way too loud
at night. This one keeps the room cool and is quiet enough
that I can sleep.

How To Use CoolCove™

1. Position & Prepare

Mount it on the wall or place it on a shelf, dresser, or tabletop. Then plug it into any standard outlet.

2. Choose Your Mode

Use the touchscreen or remote to select your preferred mode, temperature, and airflow.

3. Enjoy The Comfort

Sit back and relax as it starts delivering the comfort you need, right where you need it.

Engineered Smarter,
Making Life Easier

Engineered Smarter,
Making Life Easier

Staying comfortable should not mean heavy appliances, window vents, or astronomical energy bills.

We wanted to create a simpler solution. Our compact climate system gives you the ability to control your comfort anywhere. Mount it on the wall, place it on a shelf, or set it on a tabletop.

Simple setup. Ultra-lightweight design. Easy control. No usual AC hassle.

CoolCove™ vs. Bulky Portable AC Units

Hear From Our Expert

Most air conditioners are a hassle. They’re expensive to run, bulky, heavy, and usually need proper installation. Most require a window hose setup that often does not fit properly with different window styles, and some units can draw too much power and trip breakers.

What stood out to me about CoolCove™ is how simple it is. It can cool or heat a room quickly, it’s light enough to move around, and it has built-in safety features.

For renters, homeowners, and smaller spaces, it’s a simple, reliable way to stay comfortable while helping cut down on power bills.

James Turner
HVAC Technician

Frequently Asked Questions

CoolCove™ uses its RapidCool™ Airflow System to deliver fast, efficient cooling comfort. Warm air is pulled in through the vents, moved through an internal evaporator cooling chamber, and pushed back into the room as refreshingly cool air.

Everything is handled inside the unit, so there are no window hoses, no heavy water tanks to empty, and no messy setup required. Just plug it in, choose your mode, and enjoy cooler comfort where you need it.

The unit uses PTC ceramic heating elements, which warm up your room quickly and evenly. Unlike traditional space heaters, PTC technology automatically regulates its temperature for safer, more efficient heating by preventing overheating while providing steady, reliable warmth.

No. It is completely plug and play. Because of its sleek, space-saving design, you can easily mount it to your wall without hiring an expensive installer or dealing with ductwork. Just secure it, plug it directly into any standard 110V outlet, and you are ready to enjoy cool or warm air instantly.

It is designed to powerfully control the climate in rooms up to 549 square feet, depending on your home's insulation and layout.

Yes, it offers complete dual functionality. It cools down to 70°F and heats up to 113°F, making it your perfect, all-in-one solution for year-round comfort.

Yes. Every unit includes a wireless remote control, so you can adjust the temperature, switch modes, and change fan speeds from across the room without ever leaving your seat or getting out of bed.

Not at all. It is engineered for whisper-quiet operation. It is significantly quieter than rattling window AC units or loud floor fans, making it ideal for bedrooms, home offices, or any space where peace and quiet matter.

No. It is designed for energy-efficient operation. By cooling or heating only the room you are in, you stop wasting money blasting the thermostat for your entire home. With its low power consumption, most users notice lower utility bills compared to running central air or bulky whole-house units.

It includes built-in overheating protection, overload protection, short-circuit protection, and an anti-scalding grille. Plus, the wall-mounted design keeps it safely out of the way of pets and grandchildren, so you can enjoy perfect comfort with complete peace of mind.

Every purchase is backed by a 1-year warranty and our 90-Day "Total Comfort" Guarantee. If you are not completely satisfied with how it performs in your home, you can return it within 90 days for a full refund, so you can try it completely risk-free.
